revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-5-005

The liquid or solid medium that is contained in an electrochemical cell in order to provide the migratory ions needed for the flow of current.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Electrolyte}}
